calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2014 Continued To Dec-03-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANTHONY N. LUTI OF THE LUTI LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (323)960-2600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. KATHERINE HYANG WOL DICK OF MORGAN LEWIS LLP, TEL. NO. 442-1421 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PACIFIC MARITIME ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - The demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. The NLRA preempts plaintiff's claims. The allegations of the complaint demonstrate that plaintiff's action is based on her concerted union activities. See Par. 14 of the complaint. The court rejects plaintiff's mixed-motive argument. See Henry v. Intercontinental Radio, Inc. (1984) 155 Cal.App.3d 707, 715. Merely labeling certain claims as anti-discrimination causes of action does not circumvent the NLRA preemption. See Luke v. Collotype Labels USA, Inc. (2008) 159 Cal.App.4th 1463, 1472-1473 and Pitts v. Plumbers & Steamfitters Local Union No. 33 (S.D. Iowa 2010) 718 F.Supp.2d 1010. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
Judge: Ernest J. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Continued To Oct-01-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2014 Continued To Aug-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PACIFIC MARITIME ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to August 28, 2014. The moving party failed to deliver a courtesy copy of the challenged pleading to Department 302 three days prior to the hearing. (Local Rule 2.6C.) The Court has now obtained a copy of the challenged pleading. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
